description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:12.16.3-stretch Docker image and include the built‑in License‑Scanning template. Define a single job named test (default stage) that runs a before_script sequence: npm run build, npm i --build-from-source --verbose, cd src/util, node findandedit.js, and cd ../. In the script step the job executes npm test with the environment variables DEBUG_TOKEN and GOOGLE_API_KEY passed as --debugToken=$DEBUG_TOKEN and --googleAPIKey=$GOOGLE_API_KEY. No additional services, caches, artifacts or rules are configured.
